calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Wollack (415-316-8088) Defendant/Moving party in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues service is bad and cites a rule. The matter is passed and recalled at 10:40 am. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ROBERT WOLLACK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. Dismissal filed on August 4, 2017. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/SRB)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Fred Keeperman, Esq. (925-631-7710) for Plaintiff.
Robert Wollack (415-316-8088) Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - ARGUED. Both sides Argued. Plaintiff did not file an Opposition. Defendant reports he has filed a Demurrer. Parties step out to look at pleadings. The matter is recalled at 9:49 am. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ROBERT WOLLACK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT and DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order is signed. Defendant to file Demurrer by 7/24/17. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
